programs.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Coronavirus: Don't Blame Bats"
programs.desc: Bats are getting their share of the blame for the COVID-19 pandemic, but are they really at fault?

programs.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Peru's Mysterious Cloud Warriors"
programs.desc: Archeologists and geneticists are uncovering surprising details about one of the most mysterious civilizatiions in Pre-Incan South America.

programs.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Decoding Megalodon"
programs.desc: Scientists have concluded that "meg" was able to achieve its gargantuan proportions by starting its carnivorous diet early -- in the womb.

programs.title: Breakthrough S1 - "Noah's Ark for the Humans"
programs.desc: Scientists believe that within a few decades many useful microbes will have disappeared so they want to create a vault for Human Microbiota.

programs.title: Past, Present, Future S1 - "...of Hallucinogens"
programs.desc: While psychedelics were originally seen as a tool for spiritual enlightenment and healing, new research and studies are revisiting psychedelics to reveal their potential clinical and therapeutic impact.

programs.title: Past, Present, Future S1 - "...of Music"
programs.desc: We use music to nurture our children, comfort the sick, and worship the unseen. Music is inherently a human act, but today, artificial intelligence and algorithms have gotten more and more involved in music production, distribution, and marketing.
